    Method
    Description
    static Map<Stage,List<ChatPipelineStep>>
    YoChatAPI.getPipelineSteps()
    Returns a snapshot of pipeline steps grouped by stage.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    YoChatAPI.registerStep(Stage stage, ChatPipelineStep nextStage)
    Registers a pipeline step using the step's own default priority.
    static void
    YoChatAPI.registerStep(Stage stage, ChatPipelineStep nextStage, int priority)
    Registers a pipeline step with an explicit priority.
    static void
    YoChatAPI.unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep step)
    Unregisters a pipeline step from every stage where it is currently present.
    static void
    YoChatAPI.unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep step, Stage stage)
    Unregisters a pipeline step from a specific stage.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ChatPipelineManager.registerStep(Stage stage, @NonNull ChatPipelineStep step)
    Registers a step into the given stage using the step's default priority.
    void
    ChatPipelineManager.registerStep(Stage stage, @NonNull ChatPipelineStep step, int priority)
    Registers a step into the given stage with an explicit priority.
    void
    ChatPipelineManager.unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep step)
    Removes the given step instance from every stage where it is registered.
    void
    ChatPipelineManager.unregisterStep(Stage stage, ChatPipelineStep step)
    Removes the given step instance from a single stage.
